title: alsine ciliata
intro: Alsine ciliata, also known as creeping saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alsine ciliata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Alsine ciliata can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to support overall health and well-being.
